chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH,CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-721 of 2023 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 16.05.2023 Mr. Masood Rasool Babar Memon, advocate for petitioner. M/s Allah Bachayo Soomro, Addl. AG Sindh and Nazar Muhammad Memon, Addl.P.G Sindh. ----- Learned counsel for petitioner submits that this petition has served its purpose as missing person has surfaced and shown arrested in Crime No.69/2023 of PS Chamber District Tando Allahyar. Accordingly, this petition is disposed of. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
